subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Truth! Praise be to the Lord, the All-Loving, that at the first gleaming of dawn thou didst witness the radiant lights of thy noble father [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق حمد حضرت رب ودود را که در بدو اشراق فجر انوار پدر بزرگوار را
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
